headline: DRAM: Is the fastest-growing ETF ever just another momentum trade?
summary: Yahoo Finance Executive Editor welcomes Great Hill Capital Chairman and Managing Member Thomas Hayes, Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma, and Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferre to discuss Opening Bid's stock of the day, DRAM (DRAM), the memory-focused ETF that has rapidly become the fastest-growing ETF in history amid soaring demand for AI infrastructure and memory chips.
